title: Diversity efficiency of the verified loop declines with model scale (preregistered)

claims.text: On the 110-task hard lane at best-of-3, diversity efficiency eta = (observed gain)/(independence-predicted gain) is higher for qwen2.5:3b than qwen2.5:7b
claims.falsification: eta(7b) >= eta(3b) on the measured artifacts

claims.text: PREREGISTERED before the run completed: if eta(3b)=0.757 holds at best-of-5, the 3b wrapped rate lands in [0.21, 0.36] with point prediction 0.283 (31/110)
claims.falsification: the measured best-of-5 wrapped rate falls outside [0.21, 0.36]
